Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Compliance With Subpoena And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Anne F. Marchant, Esq., appearing for Defendant and moving party: SAFEWAY INC.
Richard Palenchar, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and opposing party: Gary Quan
Ruling:
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Safeway's motion to compel compliance with subpoena and for monetary sanctions is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the subpoena or to submit an affidavit certifying that no responsive records exist. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $660 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Continued To Jun-13-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2007 Set For Trial On Jul-30-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-16-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 305
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and Defendant. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Parties will mediate case. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 5/9/2007 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered case set for Trial on 7/30/2007 at 9:30 AM, in Department 212. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. (212)

Off Calendar Jun-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Safeway Incorporated's motion to Compel Discovery Responses granted, if verified responses have not already been served on defendant. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $250.00, to run against plaintiff's counsel. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
